case_title: RENEE HELLMAN VS. BENJAMIN CONSTRUCTION, PC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-07-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60641523)

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 60081858) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF HELLMAN, RENEE SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE CATHERINE MICHELIS LIVING TRUST DATED MARCH 19, 1996 AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN CONSTRUCTION, PC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 60102158) AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN CONSTRUCTION, PC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-18-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) GILBERTO VELASQUEZ. THE JUN-07-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELLMAN, RENEE SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE CATHERINE MICHELIS LIVING TRUST DATED MARCH 19, 1996 AS TO DEFENDANT BENJAMIN CONSTRUCTION, PC VELASQUEZ, GILBERTO BUSINESS ALLIANCE INSURANCE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-26-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-20-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2017
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60102243) AS TO DEFENDANT BUSINESS ALLIANCE INSURANCE COMPANY A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-18-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
